source_name: ABS Labour Force - resources employment by state

fields.scope: Mining and energy employment is highly concentrated. WA and QLD account for the bulk of mining employment; NSW and VIC dominate electricity supply. Regional concentration matters for transition policy.
fields.primary_source_document: ABS Labour Force, Australia, Detailed (Cat. 6291.0.55.001) Table 06 (state-level quarterly).
fields.keying_plan: Key persons-employed by state for mining, electricity supply, and gas supply ANZSIC divisions. ABS publishes state-level quarterly totals; sub-industry disaggregation may need NCVER / ABS Census reconciliation.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed state-level employment in mining, electricity, gas supply. Ballparks: WA mining ~140k, QLD mining ~90k, NSW mining (incl. coal) ~40k. Transition risk is concentrated in regional NSW (Hunter), QLD (Bowen) and VIC (La Trobe).
citation: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Labour Force, Australia, Detailed.
